author: kevaundray
content:
I think the logging function makes sense for debuggability -- this was proposed in the past, but was declined as we wanted something simple for the IO interface.

<@1408119112743256134> does it make sense to put it in a debug interface file?

For Keccak-f, it may be good to hear what zkVM teams think, I believe if we add it then the exposed interface will no longer map somewhat to the evm precompiles.

author: 0xrubo
content: well, keccak256 is not a precompile but is exposed. also, evm precompiles as a *subset * of exposed zkvm interface is pretty good.

author: kevaundray
content: ah yeah good point, its an opcode (though its a very important one 😄 )
